subject: English
title: Word Builder
tagline: Spell simple CVC words by choosing the right letters!

steps.label: First sound
steps.description: Pick the sound you hear first, like c in cat.

steps.label: Middle sound
steps.description: Pick the vowel sound in the middle, like a in cat.

steps.label: Last sound
steps.description: Pick the sound you hear last, like t in cat.

steps.label: Blend it together
steps.description: Say all three sounds together to read the word.
